name: Cash Time Loan Centers
description_short: Arizona title loan lender offering auto title loans, registration loans, and personal signature loans from $100–$20,000 with 15-minute approval and same-day funding.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers, legally incorporated as Cash Time Title Loans, Inc., was founded in 1997 and has operated in the Arizona consumer lending market for nearly three decades. Headquartered in Scottsdale, AZ, the company is licensed by the Arizona Department of Financial Institutions under license number 0903593. It is a state-regulated for-profit lender — not a credit union, CDFI, or nonprofit organization. The company earned BBB accreditation in July 2002 and has maintained it since. Cash Time is locally owned and operates under the Presto Title Loans brand as well, and absorbed CashNGo through a confirmed merger. With an estimated annual revenue of approximately $15.4 million and 18 physical locations across the Phoenix metro and Tucson, it is one of Arizona's more established regional title lenders.

Cash Time's core product is the auto title loan — a secured short-term loan in which borrowers pledge their vehicle title as collateral while retaining use of the vehicle during repayment. Loan amounts range from $100 to $20,000 per the company's own website. Beyond title loans, they offer registration loans for borrowers still making payments on a financed vehicle, personal and signature loans for applicants without a clear title, and title loan buyouts to refinance existing competitor loans at potentially lower rates. A 100% online loan option allows the full process — application, approval, and funding — to be completed without a store visit. All credit types are accepted, including applicants with bad credit or no credit history at all.

Speed and accessibility are Cash Time's clearest differentiators. The company advertises a 15-minute approval window with same-day funding via bank transfer or in-store check. Their 18 branch locations span Phoenix neighborhoods, Mesa, Goodyear, Scottsdale, and multiple Tucson sites, combining digital convenience with a meaningful local presence. Eligible collateral extends beyond passenger cars to motorcycles, RVs, and commercial vehicles — broadening their borrower pool. Review volume is a notable data point: the company claims over 9,000 five-star Google reviews across all locations, and the Tucson-specific listing carries a 5.0 rating from 1,195 verified reviews.

Cash Time is a realistic option for Arizona borrowers in genuine financial emergencies who cannot access conventional credit. That accessibility, however, comes at a steep price. Customer reviews reference APRs as high as 59%, placing these products well above the cost of bank personal loans or credit union alternatives. Auto title loans carry an inherent structural risk: default can result in vehicle repossession, which can worsen a borrower's financial situation significantly. Borrowers should treat Cash Time as a short-term emergency tool rather than a long-term financing solution, and should fully review the Loan Term Disclosures available on their website before signing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Not applicable — Cash Time is a loan lender, not a subscription service. No money-back guarantee found.

certifications: AZ Department of Financial Institutions License #0903593

pros: Founded in 1997 — nearly 30 years of Arizona title lending experience
15-minute approval process with same-day funding via bank transfer or in-store check
All credit types accepted, including bad credit and no credit history
18 physical branch locations across Phoenix metro and Tucson for in-person service
100% online loan option — full application, approval, and funding without a store visit
Accepts motorcycles, RVs, and commercial vehicles as title loan collateral — not just cars
cons: APRs cited by customers as high as 59% — far above traditional bank or credit union loan rates
Auto title loans put the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession upon default
Services limited to Arizona residents — not available in other states
No mobile app found — online access is browser-only
Specific fee schedule not prominently disclosed in search results; borrowers must review Loan Term Disclosures on the website
best_for: Arizona vehicle owners needing fast emergency cash who cannot qualify for traditional bank financing
Borrowers with bad credit or no credit history seeking same-day loan approval
Existing title loan holders wanting to refinance a competitor's loan at a lower rate
Residents needing flexibility in collateral type — motorcycles, RVs, or commercial vehicles
diagnosis: Cash Time Loan Centers is best suited for Arizona borrowers who own a vehicle outright and need quick cash for a genuine financial emergency but are locked out of conventional credit options. Their 15-minute approval and same-day funding are real operational strengths backed by a long track record and strong review volume. The primary caveat is cost — APRs as high as 59% make these loans expensive, and pledging a vehicle as collateral adds meaningful risk if repayment becomes difficult.
services: Same-Day Funding (bank transfer or in-store check)
In-Person Loans at 18 Arizona branch locations
Bad Credit Loans (all credit types accepted)
